calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: John Dearman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioner Father of Minor Antonino andrini and mother Irish Perez Gaid present in court.
Nicholas George Soter, Esq., appearing for Petitioner.
Petitioner Antonino Andrini Sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Antonio Marcello Perez to Antonino Marco Perez Andrini.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.
